com.google.android.material.card.Materia:
>>>>>> final xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" xmlns:tools="http://schemas.android.com/tools" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" <<<<<<< HEAD android:layout_marginHorizontal="16dp" android:layout_marginVertical="6dp" app:cardCornerRadius="16dp" app:cardElevation="0dp" app:cardBackgroundColor="@color/bg_surface" ======= android:layout_marginHorizontal="@dimen/space_4" android:layout_marginVertical="@dimen/space_1" app:cardBackgroundColor="@color/bg_surface" app:cardCornerRadius="@dimen/radius_large" >>>>>>> final app:strokeColor="@color/border_subtle" app:strokeWidth="1dp">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" <<<<<<< HEAD android:orientation="horizontal" android:padding="12dp" android:gravity="center_vertical"> ======= android:gravity="center_vertical" android:orientation="horizontal" android:padding="@dimen/space_3"> >>>>>>> final
<ImageView android:id="@+id/iv_role_arrow" android:layout_width="24dp" android:layout_height="24dp" <<<<<<< HEAD android:src="@drawable/ic_arrow_forward" android:contentDescription="@string/role_change_history" android:layout_marginEnd="12dp" /> ======= android:layout_marginEnd="@dimen/space_3" android:contentDescription="@string/role_change_history" android:src="@drawable/ic_arrow_forward" /> >>>>>>> final
<TextView android:id="@+id/tv_target_user" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" <<<<<<< HEAD android:textSize="14sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:textColor="@color/text_primary" ======= android:textColor="@color/text_primary" android:textSize="@dimen/text_base" android:textStyle="bold" >>>>>>> final tools:text="John Doe" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tv_role_change" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" <<<<<<< HEAD android:textSize="13sp" android:textColor="@color/brand_primary" android:layout_marginTop="2dp" ======= android:layout_marginTop="@dimen/space_1" android:textColor="@color/brand_primary" android:textSize="@dimen/text_sm" >>>>>>> final tools:text="Teacher → Student" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tv_changed_by" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" <<<<<<< HEAD android:textSize="12sp" android:textColor="@color/text_secondary" android:layout_marginTop="2dp" ======= android:layout_marginTop="@dimen/space_1" android:textColor="@color/text_secondary" android:textSize="@dimen/text_xs" >>>>>>> final tools:text="By: Admin Name" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tv_reason" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" <<<<<<< HEAD android:textSize="12sp" android:textColor="@color/text_hint" android:layout_marginTop="2dp" ======= android:layout_marginTop="@dimen/space_1" android:textColor="@color/text_hint" android:textSize="@dimen/text_xs" >>>>>>> final android:visibility="gone" tools:text="Reason: misconduct" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tv_timestamp" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" <<<<<<< HEAD android:textSize="11sp" android:textColor="@color/text_hint" ======= android:layout_marginStart="@dimen/space_2" android:textColor="@color/text_hint" android:textSize="@dimen/text_xs" >>>>>>> final tools:text="2 hrs ago" />
